name: Nicotinamide
summary: Vitamin B3 amide tracked for UV DNA-repair biology and skin-cancer prevention evidence in high-risk populations.
mechanism_summary: Supports NAD-linked cellular metabolism and UV DNA-damage repair in skin models, with clinical evidence focused on skin-cancer chemoprevention.

open_questions: Whether skin-cancer prevention reflects broad DNA-repair enhancement or a narrow tissue-specific benefit
Which immune or risk contexts determine response, given the transplant-recipient null result
